Name: year
Label: Year
Description: Year in which TSA detections occurred.

Name: code
Label: Airport code
Description: International Air Transport Association airport code provided by TSA.

Name: name
Label: Airport name
Description: Official name of airport, provided by https://ourairports.com/.

Name: municipality
Label: Airport municipality
Description: What municipality the airport is located in, provided by https://ourairports.com/.

Name: state
Label: State
Description: State in which the airport is located. Derived from iso_region column from http://ourairports.com/.

Name: loaded_total
Label: Loaded guns detected
Description: The total number of loaded guns detected by TSA in a given year at a given airport.

Name: unloaded_total
Label: Unloaded guns detected
Description: The total number of unloaded guns detected by TSA in a given year at a given airport.

Name: unknown_total
Label: Unknown loaded status detections
Description: The total number of guns recovered by TSA in a given year at a given airport where the loaded/unloaded status was not known.

Name: total_weapon_count
Label: Total gun detections
Description: The total number of guns detected by TSA in a given year at a given airport, regardless of loaded/unloaded status.

Name: throughput
Label: Number of passengers screened
Description: The total number of passengers screened by TSA in a given year at a given airport.

Name: rate
Label: Gun detections per 100k
Description: The rate of gun recoveries per throughput for every 100,000 screenings: total_weapon_count ÷ throughput × 100,000

Name: id
Label: Airport ID
Description: Integer airport ID given by https://ourairports.com/. Remains constant even if airport code changes.

Name: type
Label: Airport size
Description: Small, medium or large airport designation as provided by https://ourairports.com/.

Name: latitude_deg
Label: Airport latitude
Description: Airport latitude in decimal degrees (positive for north) as provided by https://ourairports.com/.

Name: longitude_deg
Label: Airport longitude
Description: The airport longitude in decimal degrees (positive for east) as provided by https://ourairports.com/.

Name: elevation_ft
Label: Airport elevation
Description: Airport elevation from mean sea level in feet not meters as provided by https://ourairports.com/.

Name: iso_country
Label: Airport country
Description: ISO country code of airport location. This dataset only contains U.S. airports. Provided by https://ourairports.com/.

Name: iso_region
Label: Airport region
Description: ISO region code. This dataset contains only U.S. states and territories. Provided by https://ourairports.com/.

Name: state_abbr
Label: Airport state postal abbreviation
Description: Airport state postal abbreviation generated from iso_region column.

Name: wikipedia_link
Label: Airport Wikipedia link
Description: Link to airport's Wikipedia where available. Provided by https://ourairports.com/.
